creator: curtisjbrandt@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 154148
diff.txt

I was able to reproduce the same message when attempting to send an e-mail to misc+subscribe@capbug.org.

I have attached a diff for the FreeBSD doc team to consider. My proposed change includes one link to CapBUG's Google Groups page and a second link to CapBUG's website.

I am aware the website link is already available in the <url></url> tags. However, a duplicate website link appears to be common among other user group description entries.
